Ethics is a system of determining what actions to take in certain situations. It has a few rulings (derived from Fiqh rulings)

* [[Praiseworthy]]
** [[obligations]] (fard)
** [[Supererogations]] (''mustahabb)''
* [[Allowed]]/Neutral (''mubah)''
* [[Blameworthy]]
** [[Suberogations]] (''makrooh)''
** [[Prohibitions]]/[[Forbidden]] (haraam)

== References ==
[[Category:Ethics]]
[[sn:Ethics]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
